subject: goldfish
one_liner: Full-spectrum operational intelligence for an asset that forgets it is being watched every three seconds.
brand_voice_notes: Deadpan defense-contractor gravitas pointed at a single goldfish. Classification theater, clearance tiers, and link-analysis applied to a creature in a sealed glass bowl. Never winks. The joke is that the apparatus is real and the threat is not.

hero.h1: Know everything about a fish that knows nothing.
hero.sub: Murk is a unified intelligence platform for the home aquarium. One operator, one bowl, one asset under continuous lawful observation. It cannot remember you. We remember everything.

features.title: Predictive Lap Modeling
features.blurb: Murk ingests the asset's complete memory, all three seconds of it, and forecasts the next lap of the bowl at defense-grade confidence. The fish does not know where it is going. You will.

features.title: Associate Mapping
features.blurb: Surface the network behind your fish. The filter it depends on, the plastic castle it keeps returning to, the single flake it cannot quit. Every relationship scored, ranked, and filed.

features.title: Perimeter Fusion
features.blurb: Round-the-clock threat assessment of a sealed environment containing one fish and no doors. Zero incidents to date. We have chosen to interpret that as evidence the system is working.

pricing_tiers.name: Hobbyist Clearance
pricing_tiers.tagline: For the operator with one bowl and nothing to hide.

pricing_tiers.name: Enterprise Tank
pricing_tiers.tagline: When one fish becomes a fleet.
perks: A dedicated analyst who will never see your fish

pricing_tiers.name: Sovereign
perks: Pricing redacted at our sole discretion

testimonials.quote: We finally know where the fish is. It is in the bowl. It has always been in the bowl. Murk has confirmed this fourteen thousand times.
testimonials.name: Dale Vorhees
testimonials.title: Director of Aquatic Threat Intelligence, a two-gallon bowl

testimonials.quote: Before Murk I assumed my goldfish remembered me. Murk produced a report. It does not.
testimonials.name: Priya Anand
testimonials.title: Chief Operating Officer, Household Wetware Division

testimonials.quote: The link graph flagged that my fish has been associating with a plastic castle since day one. We have opened a file and frozen the castle's assets.
testimonials.name: Gerald Okafor
testimonials.title: Senior Fellow, Center for Freshwater Accountability

demo_screen_concept: A dark Gotham-style intelligence operations console tracking one goldfish designated ASSET // GARY-01. Left rail: a live tank-map grid with the fish rendered as a pulsing node tracing a path, a classification banner across the top, redaction bars over irrelevant coordinates, and toggleable map layers (path, heat, sonar). Center: a behavioral-forecast panel charting the predicted next lap with a confidence readout and a 'reconstructed memory' window that is almost entirely blank. Right rail: a link-analysis graph connecting GARY-01 to associated entities (filter, plastic castle, single flake, thermometer) with relationship scores; clicking a node opens a dossier modal. Bottom: a scrolling threat feed with a severity filter where every entry, at every severity, reads NO THREAT DETECTED.

design_direction.style: Redacted tactical intelligence console (dark surveillance HUD). A near-black blacksite ground carrying a dense, scannable operations layout: hairline grid lines, a classification banner strip, monospace telemetry for every coordinate, score, timestamp and price, and redaction bars used as a deliberate decorative-and-functional motif. One cold steel-cyan signal color carries structure, live nodes, links and primary affordances; one classified-red is reserved strictly for threat, alert and redaction labels and appears almost nowhere. Crosshairs, corner registration ticks, and node-graph linework rendered as inline SVG. No glow soup, no gradient blobs, no glassmorphism, no rounded marketing cards. Reads like a defense-intelligence platform that has been pointed, with total seriousness, at a single fish in a bowl.
design_direction.archetype: Real-Time / Operations landing into a data-dense ops console demo
design_direction.motion_vocab: Restrained and instrumental: a slow pulse on the live asset node, hairline scan-line drift across the map, 150-200ms ease-out reveals on panels, threat-feed rows ticking in. Honors prefers-reduced-motion by holding everything static.
design_direction.hero_composition_notes: Left-weighted: classification banner pinned to the very top edge; oversized Space Grotesk headline with a redaction bar struck through one word; monospace 'asset status' readout beneath; a featured surveillance asset photograph of a single goldfish in dark water occupying the right of the hero with corner registration ticks framing it; primary CTA in steel-cyan, a secondary 'open the console' ghost button beside it.

images.rationale: Dark tactical HUD, but the design is asset-centric rather than purely typographic, so a featured surveillance photograph genuinely earns the hero. Hero: moody single-goldfish-in-dark-water shot, accepted attempt 1. Demo: clinical asset-ID close-up for the dossier modal, accepted attempt 1. Testimonial headshots skipped because the testimonials are from human operators (kept as redacted-ID CSS badges), not subject headshots.

items.prompt: Editorial surveillance photograph of a single small common goldfish suspended in near-black murky water, cold steel-cyan rim light, vast empty negative space on the right, faint particulate, clinical intelligence-dossier mood, shallow DOF, cinematic low-key, muted cool teal palette. Photographic. Hard bans: no text/letters/numbers/logos/watermarks/UI/overlays.

Clinical close-up surveillance photograph of one common goldfish against a flat dark teal-black void, even cold cyan key light, sharp focus on eye and gills, intelligence-asset ID photo mood, deadpan, muted cool palette, single subject. Photographic. Hard bans: no text/letters/numbers/logos/watermarks/UI/overlays/borders.
